# Global Media

> Global Media is a citizen-journalism news portal — breaking news, world affairs, business, technology, sport and culture, submitted by the world, for the world.

Stories are submitted by the public and publish to the front page instantly. Editors may revert anything that breaches standards.

## Pages

- [Front Page](/): The latest published stories, sorted by recency, with a trending sidebar.
- [Submit a Story](/submit): Public submission form for new articles, with image upload.
- [What is Citizen Journalism](/education/what-is-citizen-journalism): A guide explaining citizen journalism, its history, and why it matters.
